title: Cam Jipp Pre Rankett Idea
html:
The "Diddles/Jipp idea" is the earliest co-founder-shaped artifact in the corpus — a Summer 2024 workshop between Yahir, Cam Jipp, and diddles around relaunching $PHIB as a Solana memecoin via the Moonshot launchpad. It is the missing predecessor to the Yahir+Diddles operating split that crystallizes 18 months later as Rankett. (inferred:) the idea was crypto-flavored, not AEO-flavored — the partnership shape is what carried forward, not the product.

TL;DR

  • Idea name (working): "Diddles/Jipp idea" — Yahir's own shorthand from the July 4 mega notebook.
  • Premise (inferred from corpus): relaunch $PHIB (Yahir's 2022-era memecoin from the corvallis crypto club cohort) as a fresh Solana token via the Moonshot launchpad — "cam Jipp moonshot launch or straight on solana???" The Nov 27, 2024 PHIB Relaunch Google Doc (raw only, no summary yet) (Solana MC math, Raydium, Telegram safeguard buy bot, contract address verification) is the closest surviving deliverable.
  • Partnership shape: Yahir + Cam Jipp + diddles — the same trio that later resolves into Yahir + Diddles operating Rankett, with Cam quietly absent.
  • Timing: Discussed July 2024 (mid-Asia trip prep), workshopped through fall 2024 from inside Shanghai, surfaces as a relaunch doc in late November 2024 right before departure from China.
  • Outcome: No evidence the launch ever shipped. The thread goes silent post-China. By May 2025 the partnership conversation has shifted to Austin-rooming + Brotein, not crypto.

What we know

The "Diddles/Jipp idea" lives in two specific lines of the July 4, 2024 mega notebook (the densest junk-drawer note in the corpus, spanning Asia trip + China prep + grad year + capstone):

"-look into the Diddles/jipp idea" (line 210, in the "Whilst in Chengdu" todo block)

"-cam Jipp moonshot launch or straight on solana???" (line 374, mid-China)

Same notebook is where Cam Jipp gets named as the Austin co-mover for the first time and where Diddles first appears — both as workshop partners on this single tagged-together idea. The phrasing "Diddles/jipp" (slash, joint billing) is the only place in the corpus the two are bracketed as a co-founder pair before Rankett.

The most likely product behind the workshop, per surrounding context:

  • PHIB relaunch: $PHIB was originally a 2023 BSC memecoin per the PHIB launch playbook summary (Pancakeswap LP, six wallets, CMC application). A separate "PHIB Relaunch" Google Doc dated Nov 27, 2024 (raw only, no summary yet — raw/google-docs/2024-11-27-PHIB-Relaunch.md) flips the stack to Solana — written from Shanghai, four months after the July notebook line, three weeks before Yahir's China departure. The relaunch doc is concrete-launch-ready: Moonshot vs Pumpfun MC math, Raydium trading platform, Telegram safeguard buy-bot, contract address (CA) verification flow, "TO DO: Launch coin / Price check bot." The chain switch (BSC → Solana) is itself evidence of the workshop — Yahir didn't relaunch the same architecture, he ported the brand to a new launchpad.
  • Moonshot.money is a Solana memecoin launchpad — the "moonshot launch" in the July line is literal, not metaphorical. The Nov 27 doc cites moonshot.money/verification directly.

(inferred:) the role split in the workshop was probably Diddles-on-distribution (Telegram, Twitter following) + Cam Jipp-on-marketing-energy + Yahir-on-product-and-tokenomics — i.e. exactly the sales/ops/build split that re-emerges in rankett with Diddles owning agency relationships and Yahir owning backend. The corpus has thin signal on whether Cam ever materially contributed; per the Cam entity page, Yahir's later August 2025 critique was "result driven not mission driven" — possibly a retrospective read on the crypto window not shipping.

How it relates to Rankett

The Diddles/Jipp idea is Rankett's partnership prototype, not its product prototype:

  • Same trio, different roles: Yahir + Diddles + Cam in 2024 (memecoin) → Yahir + Diddles, no Cam, in 2026 (AEO). The partnership shape proved durable; the product changed completely.
  • Same instinct on positioning: gatekept, niche, distribution-heavy — memecoins win on telegram-group hype + early-buyer exclusivity, which structurally mirrors rankett's ghost white label + agency-only gatekept funnel. The exclusivity instinct Yahir absorbed from the China chapter runs through both.
  • Same launchpad-vs-direct fork: "moonshot launch or straight on solana???" is the same shape as the later Rankett "sell to agencies or sell direct to clients" fork — Yahir gravitates toward the gated/leveraged channel both times.
  • The crypto era didn't ship; the AEO era did: per $PHIB stub, the launch is unconfirmed and likely never executed. The relaunch doc is the latest crypto-side artifact in the corpus before it goes silent. The Yahir+Diddles partnership re-activates 13 months later on a completely different stack.

The honest reading is: Cam Jipp was workshopped into a partnership that never produced a deliverable, then quietly displaced when the same partnership shape attached to a different product Yahir actually wanted to ship. This is one of the cleanest "idea didn't work / partnership reconfigured" arcs in the corpus, and the graph should walk it from cam-jipp.md → here → rankett.md.

Open questions

  • (inferred:) was the actual idea PHIB-relaunch, or a fresh new memecoin Yahir hadn't named yet? The "Diddles/Jipp" framing in July predates the Nov PHIB relaunch doc by four months — possible the workshop started on a new coin and pivoted to PHIB as the existing-IP shortcut.
  • Did Diddles bring crypto experience to the table, or did Yahir? Both have CCC (corvallis crypto club) adjacency; Yahir's the one with the named coin.
  • Was Cam ever actually engaged on the technical/ops side, or was he being recruited mostly for vibe-and-energy? The August 2025 "low energy / horrible at explaining things" critique suggests the latter.
  • Did the relaunch doc actually deploy? No on-chain evidence in the corpus. The Telegram safeguard bot, the Raydium pool, the price-check bot — none are confirmed alive.
  • Did the workshop produce any tokenomics graphic / whitepaper / pitch deck distinct from the 2022 era PHIB todos? Not surfaced yet.

The corpus has thin signal on this — the idea is real but mostly gestural in writing. Two lines in a junk-drawer note + one Google Doc is the entire surviving record. Consider writing the longer version once Yahir confirms the actual product premise.

Source summaries

  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — the two-line earliest mention ("Diddles/jipp idea", "cam Jipp moonshot launch or straight on solana???")
  • 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future — first full naming of cam jipp as partner-in-crime, written from Shanghai
  • 2026 01 02 diddles call — the Diddles partnership re-emerging on the AEO/Rankett stack 18 months later (no Cam)
  • 2024 11 28 PHIB — the BSC-era PHIB launch playbook (the predecessor product the relaunch was reviving)

(Plus the Nov 27, 2024 PHIB Relaunch raw Google Doc — raw/google-docs/2024-11-27-PHIB-Relaunch.md — Moonshot/Solana launch checklist, no summary yet — closest surviving deliverable from the workshop window.)

Connections

  • cam jipp — the partner this idea was workshopped with
  • diddles — the other partner in the original trio; survives into Rankett
  • phib — the most likely product behind the workshop
  • rankett — the partnership that this prototype eventually became (minus Cam)
  • — the bucket pre-Rankett ideas live in
  • corvallis crypto club — the cohort context for Yahir's crypto-era thinking
  • exclusivity as chinese trait — the gatekeeping instinct that runs through memecoin launches → Rankett's agency filter
  • ghost white label — Rankett's productized version of the same instinct
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — the parallel post-China project that did ship; this idea is the road-not-taken cousin
